idea-plugin.name: Eta Template
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting and editor support for the Eta template language in WebStorm and other JetBrains IDEs.

Features

  • Recognizes .eta files with a dedicated file type and icon
  • Highlights Eta delimiters (<% %>), interpolation (<%= %>), and raw output (<%~ %>) tags
  • Full HTML syntax highlighting for template content outside Eta tags
  • JavaScript syntax highlighting inside Eta tags (keywords, strings, operators)
  • Whitespace control markers (<%_, _%>, <%-, -%>) highlighting
  • Brace matching for <% %> pairs
  • Block comment/uncomment support (Ctrl+Shift+/)
  • Code folding for Eta blocks
  • Correctly handles %> inside JS strings and comments
  • Customizable colors via Settings > Editor > Color Scheme > Eta Template

About Eta

Eta is a lightweight, fast, and pluggable embedded JavaScript template engine. It is similar to EJS but with improved performance, better whitespace control, and correct handling of edge cases.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • JavaScript language injection inside Eta tags (full IDE support: syntax highlighting, code completion, error checking)
  • All JS blocks in a file are concatenated into a single context for correct cross-block analysis
  • Built-in Eta functions (include, includeAsync, layout) and it variable are pre-declared
  • Lexer correctly handles %> inside JS strings, comments, and template literals

0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Syntax highlighting for Eta delimiters, HTML, and JavaScript
  • Brace matching, code folding, and block comment support
  • Color settings page for customization
